text:

 >Maintainer of sysutils/cpdup,

 >
 >The full text of the PR can be found at:
 >    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/127630

Please commit... no change on the ports tree only an updated on the 
new version.
Thanks

Best Regards,
